content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the amendment; the reported disabled-policy lookup leak is supported by the current control flow.

## Votes

- `fr-7-f6986f8d`: Accept
  The code only bypasses bead listing when policy.enabled is false and current_count is below threshold. Once the threshold is met, handle_propose_new_bead still calls list_all_bead_summaries, derives matching_beads, and runs the unguarded matching-bead recovery loop before creation, including br show calls. Therefore disabled parsimonious lookup can still block creation on br list/show failures or reuse an existing bead, contrary to the stated disabled-policy behavior.
